title: Catears on armor / CIT Resewn Version
body:
# required: https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn
### This resourcepack works only if you have CIT installed.
### If you dont want to install a mod just use the vanilla version:
### https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/catears-on-armor



Adds Catears to all armor types , to the actual items and to the armor models.
The texture changes only if you name them :

| Helmet type  | Name              |    Names of versions 2.0.0 or older(use not recommended)        |
| -------------  | ------------- | ------ |
| Leather Helmet  | Cateared Helmet  |  UwU Cap  |
| Chainmail Helmet  | Cateared Helmet  | UwU Helmet   |
| Gold Helmet  | Cateared Helmet  | UwU Helmet   |
| Iron Helmet  | Cateared Helmet  | UwU Helmet  |
| Diamond Helmet  | Cateared Helmet  | UwU Helmet |
| Netherite Helmet  | Cateared Helmet  | UwU Helmet |
| Turtle Shell  | Cateared Helmet  | - |

Have Fun :)
